rows.description: Plate excize due Lady Day Cast
rows.notes: Amounts (5£ 15s 0d) are in full consensus. Selected gemini-flash for description 'Plate excize due Lady Day Cast' which is a clearer reading from the image. claude-haiku misread 'Cast' as 'next'.

Pounds (100) and shillings (2) are in full consensus. The description is empty as per the image (only a horizontal line, no text). For pence, gemini-flash extracted '119' which violates the 'Pence ≥ 12' hard rule. Therefore, claude-haiku's '11' pence is selected, as it is the only candidate that survives the hard rule filter for the pence value, implying a correction from the raw '119' visible on the page.
